description:
Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic software


1. Support for HTTP2 protocol, which can be enabled in settings(#388)(#51)；
2. Support for zstd decode(#459)(#455)(#404)；
3. Added auto read marking(#446)；
4. Toolbox now supports AES encryption and decryption；
5. Fixed WebSocket parsing errors(#316)；
6. Fix some proxy forwarding failure issues
